sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT, char_col VARCHAR(10), arr_col VECTOR);
INSERT INTO test_data (id, char_col, arr_col) VALUES (1, 'a', vector('alpha', 'beta', null, 'gamma'));
INSERT INTO test_data (id, char_col, arr_col) VALUES (2, 'b', vector('delta', 2, 3.1415));
SELECT position(NULL, char_col) AS position_value FROM test_data WHERE char_col IS NOT NULL;
SELECT position('g', 'abcdefg', 1) AS position_value WHERE char_col IS NULL;
SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE position(char_col, 'babab', 1, 2) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE position('b', char_col) IS NULL AND (char_col || '') IS NULL;
SELECT id, position(CASE WHEN arr_col IS NOT NULL THEN 3 ELSE NULL END, arr_col) AS pos FROM test_data GROUP BY id HAVING pos > 0;
SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE position('a', arr_col) IS NULL OR (SELECT position(NULL, CONCAT(char_col, 'z'))) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, position(char_col, (SELECT CONCAT(char_col, 'b') FROM test_data WHERE id = 1)) AS position_value FROM test_data WHERE arr_col IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE position('c', NULL) IS NOT NULL OR (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_data WHERE char_col IS NOT NULL) IS NULL;
CREATE TABLE temp_data (data VARCHAR(5), num INT);
INSERT INTO temp_data (data, num) VALUES ('test', NULL), (NULL, 5);
SELECT data FROM temp_data WHERE position('e', data) IS NOT NULL AND num IS NULL;
SELECT data FROM temp_data LEFT JOIN test_data ON position(data, char_col) IS NULL GROUP BY data HAVING COUNT(data) < 5;
